feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Do you think Ryu ever had a blast with her?
entry.content: Do you think Ryu ever had a blast with her?

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Battery thread
entry.content: What batteries are you all running? My car and one of my trucks both have decided to eat shit and now I gotta shop around. Feel like batteries only last 3-4 years now which is pretty shitty.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Remakes
entry.content: I realized recently that I prefer to play remakes instead of new games >Don't have to learn a bunch of new game systems >Most new games are trash anyway >Vaguely remember what to do and where to go, no need for guides >Sweet nostalgia Playing remakes is the way to go.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Ol' Reliable
entry.content: What are some weapons, spells, attacks, etc. that you would consider to be the epitome of reliable? I'd say most stock weapons you get in Team Fortress 2 fit this bill, but in particular the default rocket launcher and shotgun are incredibly reliable.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Claude won
entry.content: ChatGPT (OpenAI) Users: ~1.1 billion MAU / 900M weekly active Revenue: ~$25B ARR Valuation: $852B (March 2026 raise) Claude (Anthropic) Users: ~245 million MAU Revenue: ~$47B ARR (overtook OpenAI in April 2026) Valuation: $965B (May 2026 Series H) Note: highest revenue-per-user of any major assistant (~$2.76 ARPU vs ChatGPT's $1.74), 13% paid conversion rate Gemini (Google) Users: ~662M-900M MAU (estimates vary by source) Revenue: not broken out separately, folded into Alphabet Valuation: N/A (p

entry.title: /int/ International: Do you travel in your country? I don't. If I did, it would go exactly like this:…
entry.content: Do you travel in your country? I don't. If I did, it would go exactly like this: >Stay in my hotel room on my phone or laptop most of the time >Only go to tourist trap places, so that I don't feel out of place >Only eat at McDonalds, because there's a 99% chance I don't like the local food >Go home having not spoken to a single person >"Then go with a travel group, bro!" Going with a travel group would go like this: >Introduce myself to the other people in the group >Have nothing else to say bec

entry.title: /mu/ Music: It’s a hilarious and entirely accurate evolution. Millennials essentially traded…
entry.content: It’s a hilarious and entirely accurate evolution. Millennials essentially traded in their Portland, Oregon hipster starter packs for an Austin, Texas cowboy starter pack, completely bypassing any phase in between. If you trace the cultural timeline, it makes a bizarre amount of sense: 2012: You are drinking a craft IPA out of a mason jar, wearing a flannel shirt, sporting a massive beard, and violently stomping your foot to Mumford & Sons, The Lumineers, or Of Monsters and Men. 2026: You are dri

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >Vivaldi's latest update shows them deprecating Manifest V2 extensions as well I…
entry.content: >Vivaldi's latest update shows them deprecating Manifest V2 extensions as well It's over Chromium bros. What do we do now? Will Edge be the only one that will keep Manifest V2 on Chromium using Microsoft's funding or will they also give up? Will Google eventually strong arm Mozilla into dropping it on Firefox and its forks as well?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I'm sick of wasting time searching for tools that are >free >require no logins >…
entry.content: I'm sick of wasting time searching for tools that are >free >require no logins >have no paywalled features >have no ads Since such tools aren't marketed they're virtually impossible to find through Google. Can we come up with a name for such tools that people can use to make them searchable? You know, similar to suckless.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: did you know the angry birds theme is divided into three parts? the first part i…
entry.content: did you know the angry birds theme is divided into three parts? the first part is the birds being happy and nice and the second part is realizing the pigs stole the eggs and the third part is a crazy and ridiculous war they are fighting to get them back im going to the chinese buffet now guys bye also im getting an angry birds air swimmer (picrel) for my birthday and i even got a replacement battery for it because a specific part of it likely wont work anymore without being replaced

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: The Truth is
entry.content: >I’m not one who asks for help but it happens at times >My neighbors don’t like me the noise is nonsense >I feed the birds and the rest of the animals to be >1 of my neighbors glorified another man who passed >Said how he is so great he fed all the animals o yea >Not like me I even feed the bugs but he don’t know >Talk crap without ever knowing the full truth, I laugh >A lie can be undone with a simple question, to hear >While the truth will always remain, most need to learn

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: The Gape Queens invasion of toddlertopia was a massivr strategic blunder. Chudci…
entry.content: The Gape Queens invasion of toddlertopia was a massivr strategic blunder. Chudcity honored its defensive pact and rescued the toddlers. Sadly over 500,000 toddlers were gaped before the liberation of toddleropolis. The international backlash as news broke of the horrors of troon occupation lead to mass ACKing in Troon City, with over 41% of the population committing suicide. The 13 month war was one of the darkest chapters in world history.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8362 Hyper Furblue Edition Previous Thread: >>83952167 F…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8362 Hyper Furblue Edition Previous Thread: >>83952167 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their prof

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Batman: Wait! I have a riddle for you! >The Riddler: For me? Really? Tell me. >…
entry.content: >Batman: Wait! I have a riddle for you! >The Riddler: For me? Really? Tell me. >Batman: I see without seeing. To me, darkness is as clear as daylight. What am I? >The Riddler: Please! You're as blind as a bat! >Batman: Exactly. This movie is deeper than you guys give it credit for.

entry.title: /b/ Random: How do I shoot ropes of cum?
entry.content: I genuinely want to know. Every time I cum it always seem to just "drip". I can usually cum a decent amount and I want to shoot some big ropes on a girl. There was only one time where I didn't nut for about a week and decided to give me gf at the time a facial, that one time I managed to shoot rope across her face like chin to hairline. I'm not sure what I did differently and I haven't been able to reproduce it since. Any help would be appreciated anons.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Google won't index my site (Bing/Yandex do) — "crawled, currently not indexed" at scale
entry.content: >be me, solo dev, built a VR video tube on Next.js, full SSR >vrtubbies.com, ~47k pages, clean markup, self-canonical, valid VideoObject/BreadcrumbList schema, sitemaps 0 errors, robots allows everything >Googlebot crawls every page fine — 200, fetch successful >then: "Crawled – currently not indexed" on literally every page except the homepage >~59k URLs stuck in that bucket >no manual action, no security issue, nothing flagged — GSC just says nothing >Bing indexes the whole thing instantly, ra

entry.title: /b/ Random: 6 months building a VR porn site, google refuses to index it. am i cooked?
entry.content: >be me, burnt-out code monkey trying to make rent >every VR porn site is a paywalled sub hellscape with UX from 2009 >"i'll build a good one and take a cut. everybody wins" >spend 6 months on vrtubbies.com >make it actually clean, fast, intuitive — sorted by studio / model / category / headset >works on Quest 3, PSVR2, Vision Pro >it looks GOOD. no popup cancer, no 40 redirects, no 'sign up to see blurry preview' >i'm proud of the thing. honestly the nicest VR porn UX on the net >submit to googl

entry.title: /g/ Technology: creating an uncucked license
entry.content: now i made some software but now i'm thinking.. how i will open this can of tomato sauce to the public without cucking myself, but without cucking the average dev? gplv3 is fun and all but i think its fucking retarded when it comes to maintaining credit and ownership over your shit I am not going to do something and then have a corporation lie and take my shit and not give me proper credit and then make brilliongrazillions off of it no motherfucker fuck you le freedumbz I will make it open sourc

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Knowledge != intelligence
entry.content: >Be ByteDance >Invent a Looped LLM >Basically runs multiple "chat, is this true?" checks before outputting a token >Only 2.6B params, performs like 8B >Ofc it has less knowledge than a real 8B, but AI agents can make web searches so it doesn't really matter Meanwhile, the world keeps focusing on giant know-all LLMs, even though they're literally overfitting existing repos

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: dropping weiqi, playing le chesserino only insteadorino on lichesserino. because…
entry.content: dropping weiqi, playing le chesserino only insteadorino on lichesserino. because I sorta wanna go play chess in person at an event and weiqi isn't popularino so there isn't much learning resources available and playing weiqi and chess doesn't bring double the benefit so I'll stick with chesserino. plus chesserino is cool because it's not just about manipulating my pieces but also manipulating my opponentino which is actually heckin kinoino 2bh. so I'm thinking about coolerino manipulator kino 'n

entry.title: /g/ Technology: AI Override Prompts?
entry.content: So, with the rise of the AI Overlord somethings come to mind; AI is probably being used in place of (or at least as a tool) to do HR and damage control! This thought experiment is brought on by Bethesda's insanity with their layoffs. Too many comments on how it's "bad business" to keep their literal bread winners around. Is it possible to craft comments engineered to make the bot override its rules, edit its posts, spam a phrase, or identify itself?
